code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> NotStarted: Test available
    
    NotStarted --> InProgress: User clicks "Start Test"
    
    state InProgress {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> AnsweringQuestions
        AnsweringQuestions --> AnsweringQuestions: Select/Change answer
        AnsweringQuestions --> MarkedForReview: Mark for review
        MarkedForReview --> AnsweringQuestions: Continue answering
    }
    
    InProgress --> Submitted: User clicks submit
    InProgress --> AutoSubmitted: Timer expires
    
    Submitted --> ResultsCalculated: System calculates score
    AutoSubmitted --> ResultsCalculated: System calculates score
    
    ResultsCalculated --> Analyzed: System analyzes performance
    
    state Analyzed {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> ScoreGenerated
        ScoreGenerated --> SectionBreakdownCreated
        SectionBreakdownCreated --> TopicBreakdownCreated
        TopicBreakdownCreated --> WeakAreasIdentified
        WeakAreasIdentified --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
    }
    
    Analyzed --> PracticeRecommended: Weak topics found
    Analyzed --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]: No weak topics
    
    PracticeRecommended --> NotStarted: Practice test scheduled
    
    note right of InProgress
        attempt.status: in_progress
        Timer running
        Answers being recorded
    end note
    
    note right of Submitted
        attempt.status: submitted
        submittedAt: timestamp
    end note
    
    note right of AutoSubmitted
        attempt.status: auto_submitted
        Forced submission by system
    end note
    
    note right of Analyzed
        score, correctAnswers calculated
        sectionBreakdown JSON created
        topicBreakdown JSON created
        weak_topics updated
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个状态图，描述患者从HealthTech_PatientRecords系统里开始一次诊断测试的完整流程。最开始的状态叫NotStarted，触发条件是"Test available"。
明白，所以患者记录系统触发了测试可用状态。那用户点击"Start Test"之后进入什么状态？我需要确认这个过渡的命名。
对，进入InProgress状态。这个状态比较复杂，我想把它做成一个复合状态，里面包含HealthTech_LabAnalyzer参与的实际答题流程。
好的，我在InProgress里画了HealthTech_LabAnalyzer指向AnsweringQuestions，然后加了答题过程中可以Select/Change answer的自循环，还有Mark for review的分支。需要给这个复合状态加注释说明attempt.status和计时器吗？
要的，注释里写清楚attempt.status是in_progress，Timer running，Answers being recorded。另外提交有两种方式：用户主动点击submit，或者Timer expires自动提交，分别对应Submitted和AutoSubmitted两个状态。
已添加。Submitted和AutoSubmitted都会触发System calculates score，进入ResultsCalculated状态。我在这两个状态旁边加了注释区分submittedAt和forced submission的情况。
接下来是Analyzed复合状态，这里涉及HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault的数据处理。流程是ScoreGenerated → SectionBreakdownCreated → TopicBreakdownCreated → WeakAreasIdentified，最后指向HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。
Analyzed之后的分支我确认一下：如果发现了weak topics，就进入PracticeRecommended；如果没有，直接回到HealthTech_PatientRecords？
没错。PracticeRecommended之后如果安排了练习测试，就回到NotStarted重新开始。Analyzed的注释里要把score、correctAnswers、sectionBreakdown JSON、topicBreakdown JSON和weak_topics的更新都写上。
